name: team_task_get_subtree
description: Retrieve the full subtree of tasks rooted at a given task, including all descendants at every level. Returns a hierarchical view of the task tree with parent-child relationships preserved. Use this to get a complete picture of a complex work breakdown and the status of all nested subtasks.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the root task whose full subtree to retrieve

examples.name: Get full subtree of a project task
Get subtree to check overall progress
